prestazioni: Engine: 4G63T (7th-gen Galant-specific block with reinforced main bearing caps, forged crankshaft, and 85mm bore pistons from Tomei for 2.2L stroker build; paired with a Garrett GT35R turbocharger on a custom 3-inch stainless steel manifold with Tial 44mm external wastegate and 3.5-inch downpipe)

Drivetrain: OS Giken 1.5-way limited-slip differential with 2.2L gearset for the F5M42 transaxle, reinforced with a PTT short shifter and custom billet shift forks; upgraded driveshafts with CV joints from Driveshaft Shop

Suspension: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 8-position adjustable compression/rebound, custom valving for the VR-4’s multi-link rear and MacPherson front geometry, paired with SuperPro poly bushings and spherical bearing subframe mounts
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny Galant VR-4 widebody kit (fiberglass overfenders, carbon fiber front splitter with 3D-printed air curtain ducts, and a 2-piece adjustable rear wing with Gurney flap)

Exterior: Custom rally livery in Mitsubishi Ralliart historic colors (white/red/black) with 3M 1080 vinyl wrap, Hella Rallye 3000 spotlights mounted on a custom aluminum roof rack, and OMP carbon fiber side mirrors

Interior: Recaro SRD-E full bucket seats with 6-point Schroth harnesses, Momo Mod.78 steering wheel on a NRG quick-release hub, and a custom aluminum gauge pod housing Defi Advance BF gauges (boost, oil temp, fuel pressure) with a Motec C125 dash
